title: Cannot Login to Account
description: Customer reports that the login page keeps showing an invalid password error even after resetting the password twice.

title: Invoice Download Not Working
description: User cannot download the invoice from the billing section. Clicking the download button does nothing.

title: Payment Charged Twice
description: Customer says they were charged two times for the same subscription payment.

title: Profile Information Not Saving
description: User updates their phone number and address but the changes are not saved after refreshing the page.

title: Mobile App Crashes on Startup
description: Customer reports the mobile application closes immediately after opening it on Android devices.

title: Verification Email Not Received
description: User signed up but did not receive the verification email even after requesting it multiple times.

title: File Upload Failed
description: Customer cannot upload documents to the system. It shows an upload error every time.

title: Dashboard Loading Very Slowly
description: User reports that the dashboard takes more than 15 seconds to fully load after login.

title: Password Reset Link Expired
description: Customer says the password reset link expires immediately after clicking it.

title: Subscription Not Activated
description: User paid for the premium plan but the account still shows the free version.

title: Notification Not Showing
description: Customer says they are not receiving system notifications for new messages.

title: Search Function Not Working
description: User tries to search for products but the search returns empty results every time.

title: Error While Updating Password
description: Customer receives a server error while trying to update their password from account settings.

title: Unable to Add Payment Method
description: User cannot add a new credit card in the billing section. The save button does not work.

title: Report Export Not Working
description: Customer tries to export reports as PDF but the download never starts.
